Business description
X-Mozo is a boutique e-commerce company specializing in Shopify store creation and enhancement. We offer custom theme design, creative solutions, and third-party integrations. We assist from initial setup to first sale, including upgrades and new store launches.

Plus Partner

Theme customization
Store build or redesign

Store settings configuration
Product and collection setup
